runtime_scope: offline signature-data generation only; no analyser/converter behavior changes are required to build this file

v2_inputs: CocoaPods metadata mirror and header inspection
trackerscan __ALL_CLASSES__ dumps from the app corpus
v3_method: merge duplicate v2 refined signatures into canonical v1 tracker names
promote only low-noise vendor-specific class anchors
mine stored __ALL_CLASSES__ dumps for domain-disclosed trackers missed by v1/v2 anchors
keep noisy or mediation-only candidates hidden for offline evidence collection

conservative_rules: Legacy v1 signatures remain visible for continuity.
v2 refined signatures are merged into canonical v1 names; duplicate "- v2 refined" names are removed.
New visible v3 signatures must have vendor-specific class anchors and either tracking-domain corroboration or repeated low-noise SDK-core corpus evidence.
Mediation-only or generic-word evidence remains hidden.
Suppressed/noisy signatures remain in the file only for raw evidence collection and are not website-visible.

decisions.name: Adobe Experience Cloud
decisions.reason: Merged duplicate legacy Adobe Experience Cloud v1 entries into one canonical visible signature.

decisions.name: Adobe Experience Cloud
decisions.reason: Merged duplicate legacy entry into Adobe Experience Cloud

decisions.name: Amazon Advertisement
decisions.reason: Merged v2 Amazon Publisher Services/DTB refinement into canonical v1 signature; avoids exposing a duplicate tracker name.

decisions.name: AppMetrica
decisions.reason: Merged AMAAppMetrica anchors into canonical v1 signature.

decisions.name: Braze (formerly Appboy)
decisions.reason: Expanded legacy Appboy anchor with modern Braze/BrazeKit/BrazeUI class evidence mined from domain-disclosing class dumps.

decisions.name: myTarget
decisions.reason: Merged v2 myTarget ad/delegate/adapter anchors into canonical v1 signature.

decisions.name: Mintegral
decisions.reason: Merged v2 Mintegral direct/ad-unit anchors into canonical v1 signature; avoids broad MTG-only matching.

decisions.name: Amazon Advertisement - v2 refined
decisions.reason: Merged into Amazon Advertisement

decisions.name: AppMetrica - v2 refined
decisions.reason: Merged into AppMetrica

decisions.name: Mintegral - v2 refined
decisions.reason: Merged into Mintegral

decisions.name: myTarget - v2 refined
decisions.reason: Merged into myTarget

decisions.name: Ogury Presage
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Ogury/Presage namespaces and ad delegates.

decisions.name: PubNative
decisions.reason: Promoted because declared tracking domain server.pubnative.net corroborates hidden v2 PubNative class evidence; anchor is prefix-only to avoid MoPubNative false positives.

decisions.name: AdTiming
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct AdTiming SDK manager namespaces.

decisions.name: BidMachine
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes are vendor-specific SDK/ad delegate anchors across the corpus.

decisions.name: Chartbeat
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Chartbeat SDK configuration namespaces.

decisions.name: Countly
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Countly SDK namespaces; generic contains-Countly matches remain excluded.

decisions.name: Criteo
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use Criteo Publisher SDK namespaces.

decisions.name: Dynatrace
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Dynatrace SDK namespaces.

decisions.name: HelpShift
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Helpshift SDK namespaces across the corpus.

decisions.name: HyprMX
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct HyprMX placement/delegate namespaces across the corpus.

decisions.name: Instabug
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Instabug SDK namespaces; generic IBGRepro classes remain excluded.

decisions.name: KIDOZ
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct KidozSDK ad delegate namespaces.

decisions.name: LeanPlum
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Leanplum SDK namespaces across the corpus.

decisions.name: mParticle
decisions.reason: Promoted with tightened anchors because corpus classes use direct MPKit/mParticle namespaces and mparticle.weather.com appears in declared tracking domains.

decisions.name: Nielsen
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use NielsenAppSDK namespaces and imrworldwide.com is declared in tracking domains.

decisions.name: OneSignal
decisions.reason: Promoted because the corpus shows repeated SDK-core OneSignal classes with low false-positive risk.

decisions.name: OutBrain
decisions.reason: Promoted from domain/class mining because outbrain.com domains have direct Outbrain classes in one app; remaining domain-only apps stay documented as gaps.

decisions.name: Pendo
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Pendo SDK namespaces.

decisions.name: PubMatic
decisions.reason: Promoted from domain/class mining because oi-ow.pubmatic.com apps consistently expose PubMatic/OpenWrap/OMIDPubmatic classes.

decisions.name: Pushwoosh
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Pushwoosh SDK namespaces.

decisions.name: Rollbar
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Rollbar SDK namespaces.

decisions.name: Segment
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use the known Segment iOS SEGAnalytics anchor across the corpus.

decisions.name: Singular
decisions.reason: Promoted with a tightened regex because safetrack.singular.net corroborates hidden v2 Singular SDK-core classes; generic Singular* UI terms remain excluded.

decisions.name: Tappx
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Tappx SDK and OMID namespaces.

decisions.name: Tenjin
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct Tenjin SDK namespaces and track.tenjin.com is declared in tracking domains.

decisions.name: UXCam
decisions.reason: Promoted because observed classes use direct UXCam SDK namespaces.
